headline: Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF Distributions
summary: TORONTO, July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF (CBOE: MINN) (the “Fund”) is pleased to announce that distributions for the third quarter of 2026 will be payable to unitholders of Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF as follows: Record DatePayable DateDistribution PerTrust UnitJuly 31, 2026August 14, 2026$0.033August 31, 2026September 15, 2026$0.033September 30, 2026October 15, 2026$0.033 The trust units trade on Cboe Canada under the symbol MINN. headline: Leverage Shares by Themes Launches RAML, the Leverage Shares 2X Long Memory Daily ETF
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes is pleased to announce the launch of RAML, the Leverage Shares 2X Long Memory Daily ETF, available for trading beginning July 23, 2026. Designed for active traders seeking to express short-term views on the memory semiconductor market, RAML seeks to provide 200% of the daily performance of the Roundhill Memory ETF (ticker: DRAM), an ETF focused on companies across the global memory ecosystem.
